name: com.google.xr.extensions
description: Android XR Extensions package. This package provides additional XR features that are not yet supported by Unity OpenXR Android XR and OpenXR Plugin packages.

samples.description: This sample showcases the Foveation (Legacy) feature, the FoveationLevel will be changed every 5 seconds to demonstrate the 4 different levels of Foveation the profile supports.

This sample uses the Passthrough Composition Layer feature to demonstrate creating a passthrough polygonal cutout. It requires com.unity.xr.compositionlayers@1.0.0 package to access Composition Layer Support.

This sample uses the Object Tracking feature which calls the OnObjectsChanged method to track the addition and removal of tracked objects within the environment. The information regarding the tracked objects are then printed as information onto the screen.
This sample uses XRInputSubsystem to check if the tracking origin mode is Unbounded.
This smaple demonstrates the usage of QR Code tracking and marker tracking through AR Foundation's ARTrackedImageManager.
This sample demonstrates the usage of body tracking through AR Foundation's ARHumanBodyManager.
This sample includes the XRController asset.
This sample uses the Scene Meshing feature to obtain mesh data which approximates the environment and renders it.
This sample uses the Cubemap Light Estimation feature to apply lighting to a sphere based on the environment's cubemap provided by the AR Foundation's AREnvironmentManager.
